response.justification: Sarah is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of production software experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the role demands 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and her AI-specific experience only began in 2025. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, data-pipeline design for ML, or leading customer-facing technical discovery at enterprise scale — the core of this forward-deployed GenAI role.
strengths: 15+ years of production software engineering across diverse stacks, including strong TypeScript/Node.js and TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship
Recent hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly relevant to key technologies
Proven mentorship and communication skills via workshops, conference talks, and multi-module courses
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions — AI-related work only since April 2025
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or data pipelines for unstructured data
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or cloud-scale AI system design (cloud exposure is mostly AWS CDK for a pricing team)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI solutions experience vs. 8-year requirement
Strong general engineering depth with recent MCP/agentic exposure
